criteria.label: Payoff concreteness
criteria.notes: 1-4pp benchmark gain, <5 lines code. Minor: 'standard benchmarks' unnamed.

criteria.label: Staircase coherence
criteria.notes: Clean prerequisite chain. Minor: 'thinned network' implicitly inside the dropout-rule rung.

criteria.label: Destination precision
criteria.notes: Exact training rule + test-time behavior + causal explanation.

criteria.label: Narration clarity
criteria.notes: 'Forward pass', 'thinned network', 'inverted dropout', 'ensemble' defined. Minor: 'geometric mean' and 'intractable' undefined for intro audience.

criteria.label: Board specificity
criteria.notes: Both network draws very specific. Ensemble diagram says 3-node networks without specifying layer structure.

criteria.label: Board coherence
criteria.notes: Timeline sound. Minor: scale_reason and inverted_dropout_formula both at center without sub-positioning.

criteria.label: Board visual balance
criteria.notes: Three draws, multiple highlights with different colors. Excellent variety.

criteria.label: Math and notation correctness
criteria.notes: Inverted dropout formula correct. Minor: p introduced as drop probability without flagging keep-vs-drop convention difference.

criteria.label: Code-content decision
criteria.notes: NumPy snippet at t=58 mirrors narration precisely; correct mask-and-scale logic.

criteria.label: Pacing and density
criteria.notes: 9 beats / 180s averages 20s/beat. Beat at t=58 (thinned net + inverted dropout + scaling) is slightly overloaded.

criteria.label: Redundancy and focus
criteria.notes: Inverted dropout fix-at-train explained twice (t=88 and t=138). Slight pedagogical reinforcement.

topThreeIssues: Beat at t=58 is overloaded for intro learner (thinned network + inverted dropout + 1/(1-p) formula in <30s); split into two beats
Two terms used without definition for intro audience: 'intractable' (t=138) and 'geometric mean' (t=158); define inline or simplify
'center' region assigned to both inverted_dropout_formula (t=58) and scale_reason (t=80) without sub-positioning; risk of overlap
summary: High-quality plan covering core dropout, inverted dropout, ensemble interpretation, and test-time behavior. Well-sequenced staircase, precise diagrams, correct code. Main weaknesses: slightly overloaded inverted-dropout intro beat and two undefined terms inappropriate for stated intro level.
